name: chokepoint-lsass-emulation
description: Emulate LSASS file access, CryptUnprotectData call, outbound connection. Expected: EID 10/11 (non-browser file access), EID 8 (CryptUnprotectData).

detectionQueries.name: Browser Credential Store Access
detectionQueries.query: DeviceFileEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where FileName in ('Login Data', 'logins.json', 'cookies.sqlite') | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in ('chrome.exe', 'msedge.exe', 'firefox.exe') | project Timestamp, DeviceName, FileName, InitiatingProcessFileName

detectionQueries.name: CryptUnprotectData Calls
detectionQueries.query: DeviceProcessEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where ProcessCommandLine has 'CryptUnprotectData' | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, ProcessCommandLine

detectionQueries.name: Outbound Connections
detectionQueries.query: DeviceNetworkEvents | where Timestamp > ago(1h) | where RemoteIPType == 'Public' | where InitiatingProcessFileName == 'powershell.exe' | project Timestamp, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemotePort, InitiatingProcessFileName
